title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Google News Search Export parameters

content.introduction: Configure the scraper parameters to control how Google News articles are collected. These settings include language, recency filters, and result limits.

scraperParams.title: Scraper Parameters
scraperParams.content: Set these parameters in the `params` object:

rows.description: Country edition and UI language for Google News (e.g., `English (United States)`)
Filter by recency: `Any time`, `Past hour`, `Past 24h`, `Past week`, `Past year`
Maximum articles to scrape. Leave blank to extract all news since 2005.

maxResultsBehavior.title: Max Results Behavior
maxResultsBehavior.content:
The `max_results` setting affects how the scraper operates:

- **≤ 100**: No date filter is applied, fetches recent articles
- **> 100**: Scraper breaks the span into daily windows and fetches news day by day
- **Blank**: Pulls every article back to 2005-01-01 (when combined with `Any time`)

proTips.content: Leaving max_results blank with time_range as 'Any time' will pull every article back to 2005 - this can be very large.
Use time_range filters like 'Past week' for recent news monitoring.

seo.title: Update Settings - Google News Search Export - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure Google News Search Export parameters including language, time range, and result limits.
